title: You Must Know This Notice
body:
# Description

Automatically detects common configuration issues at game startup and It can also show a must-read notice before you reach the main menu.
What it checks:

- Memory allocation (warns if you allocated too little or way too much RAM)(Default: false)
- GPU configuration (detects if the game is running on integrated graphics when you have a dedicated GPU available)(Default: false)

# What you can customize:

- Welcome messages with full Markdown support (headings, bold, italic, code blocks, clickable links)
- To prevent players from skipping it too quickly, the notice confirmation time can be customized in the config (default: 9 seconds).
- Custom background images for the welcome screen
- Detection thresholds for each check (or disable checks you don't need)
- Modpack information display (name, version, support URL)
- The warning screen

# Display images:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e08e5d39780eaf9beeeaf4792e49a24d1265ef49.png)
